1 ^ Domine: 2 ^ Quī ingreditur sine maculā et operātur jūstitiam
¿~quis habitābit in tabernāculō tuō: quī loquitur vēritātem in corde suō
aut quis requiēscet in monte sanctō tuō: ^ He who walketh without blemish and worketh justice
who shall dwell in thy tabernacle: who speaketh truth in his heart

1 ^ Domine: 3 ^ quī nōn ēgit dolum in linguā suā
aut quis requiēscet in monte sanctō tuō: et opprobrium nōn accēpit adversus proximōs suōs. ^ who hath not used deceit in his tongue
who shall dwell in thy tabernacle: nor hath done evil to his neighbour
or who shall rest in thy holy hill~?: and hath not taken up a reproach against his neighbours.

1 ^ Domine: 4 ^ Ad nihilum dēductus est in conspectū ejus malignus~; timentēs autem Dominum glōrificat. Quī jūrat proximō suō et nōn dēcipit
¿~quis habitābit in tabernāculō tuō: ^ In his sight the malignant is brought to nothing
aut quis requiēscet in monte sanctō tuō: but he glorifieth them that fear the Lord. He that sweareth to his neighbour and deceiveth not

1 ^ Domine: 5 ^ quī pecūniam suam nōn dedit ad ūsūram
¿~quis habitābit in tabernāculō tuō: et mūnera super innocentem nōn accēpit~; quī facit haec
aut quis requiēscet in monte sanctō tuō: nōn movēbitur in aeternum. ^ he that hath not put out his money to usury
who shall dwell in thy tabernacle: nor taken bribes against the innocent~; he that doth these things
or who shall rest in thy holy hill~?: shall not be moved for ever.
